h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: The table card is the unclear one if the surface is already here.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Now each shaft has the interaction name first; the surface arrowhead should come from the contact push on the cart, not from the cart moving.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was expected to simply choose between the surface and table cards and proceed to draw the arrows.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Both cards reach the same contact. If this surface is the table, leave one contact label on the cart.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts the task from simply naming interactions to resolving representational overlap when the learner expresses confusion about duplicate labels.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The transcript ends immediately after the learner's pivot turn, leaving no opportunity for tutor uptake.
